name: Cream Cheese Strawberry Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Divide one white cake mix prepared according to directions between a 9x13-inch and one 8x8-inch pan. Bake and let cool.
2. Whip the cream cheese until smooth.
3. Whip the whipping cream with a little granulated sugar added. Mix in the whipped cream, cream cheese, powdered sugar, and vanilla.
4. Spread this mixture over the cake and set for 15 minutes to an hour.
5. (Optional) Use raspberries and raspberry Danish dessert instead of strawberries. Spread just the berries on top of the cream mixture.
6. Spoon out strawberry juice for the Danish dessert. Use a pie filling recipe from the Danish dessert box, using the liquid from the strawberries as part of the liquid required and water for the rest. Cool and spread over the cream mixture on the cake.
7. Cool and serve. Refrigerate before serving.
